overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through a rural medieval landscape. The character passes thatched-roof huts and wooden fences before traversing open grasslands toward a distant village settlement under an overcast, stormy sky.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a winding dirt path surrounded by dense vegetation, approaching a thatched-roof hut

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through grass and vegetation
traditional wooden hut with steep thatched roof and stone foundation
rustic wooden picket fence surrounding the hut property
tall grass and bushes lining both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through dense greenery, approaching a traditional thatched-roof hut with a wooden fence. The path is enclosed by vegetation and trees under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path with laundry lines and timber

events.description: passing the thatched-roof hut and transitioning to more open landscape with laundry lines visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past wooden structures, barrels, and clotheslines hanging between posts

entered.detail: clotheslines with hanging fabric stretched between wooden posts
stacked wooden barrels near the path edge
stacked logs and timber near the fence line

segments.scene_description: The path opens up as Geralt passes the hut, revealing laundry lines with hanging clothes and wooden barrels. The vegetation becomes less dense as the landscape transitions toward open fields.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with distant forest

agents.ego_description: walking through expansive open grasslands with a distant forest tree line visible on the horizon

entered.detail: expansive fields of tall grass stretching to the horizon
dense tree line forming the horizon boundary
bushes with white flowers lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt traverses a wide-open grassland path with flowering bushes along the edges. The landscape opens completely to reveal distant forests under the stormy sky, with no structures in immediate view.

events.description: Geralt turns slightly left toward a village hut while continuing to approach the settlement

agents.ego_description: approaching a village settlement with distant figures visible in the fields, turning toward a hut on the left

notable_agents.action: distant villager standing in the field near the path
figure walking near the village huts in the distance

entered.detail: cluster of traditional thatched-roof buildings forming a small settlement
human figures scattered throughout the village fields

segments.scene_description: As Geralt approaches the village outskirts, distant figures become visible working in the fields. The path leads toward a cluster of thatched-roof huts, and Geralt turns slightly left toward one of the buildings while maintaining his approach to the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from a secluded, wooded trail into an expansive rural landscape leading toward a village. It begins on a narrow dirt path enclosed by dense greenery and trees, moving toward a traditional thatched-roof hut and wooden fence under an overcast sky. As Geralt passes the dwelling, the environment opens up to reveal laundry lines and wooden barrels before the vegetation thins into wide-open grasslands dotted with flowering bushes. The scene then expands further to reveal distant forests beneath a stormy sky, with the path stretching across the open terrain. Finally, the camera approaches the village outskirts where figures work in the fields, turning slightly toward a cluster of thatched-roof huts as the settlement comes into view.
